topics.title: XM Radio Signs Oprah Winfrey
topics.summary: The studio discusses the details of a $55 million deal for Oprah Winfrey to host a 30-minute weekly radio show on XM, critiquing the lack of effort she is expected to put into the promotion.

topics.title: Oprah Winfrey's XM Radio Deal
topics.summary: The studio critiques Oprah Winfrey's upcoming radio venture on XM as a poorly planned deal compared to Howard Stern's impact on Sirius.

topics.title: Wayne Gretzky and Janet Jones Gambling Controversy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the reports of hockey star Wayne Gretzky's wife, Janet Jones, having a gambling problem after she was caught betting large sums of money.

topics.title: Cable Television and Industry Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses the potential impact of a-la-carte cable pricing on niche networks, the viability of the Oprah Winfrey deal with Sirius, and the future of various television channels.

topics.title: Radio Industry Experiences and Gambling
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses his history in sports radio, the allure of illegal gambling, and his past career challenges.

topics.title: Scott Farrell's Career and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features Scott Farrell discussing his transition from traditional radio to his current show, his past legal and professional conflicts, his family background, and his interactions with co-host Lynn.

topics.title: Wayne Gretzky and Janet Jones
topics.summary: The studio discusses Wayne Gretzky's career, his marriage to actress Janet Jones, and the controversy surrounding her involvement in illegal gambling.

topics.title: Sports Betting Scandals and Media Transitions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the gambling scandals involving hockey player Wayne Gretzky's wife, the career moves of announcer Al Michaels, and the perceived lack of substance in Oprah Winfrey's satellite radio deal.

topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival Logistics
topics.summary: The studio records a heated exchange regarding the lack of specific details and coordination for an upcoming film festival.

topics.title: Lisa Loeb and the Success of Stay
topics.summary: The studio features Lisa Loeb discussing her rise to fame after her song "Stay" appeared on the Reality Bites soundtrack and became a number one hit, leading to multiple record deal offers.

topics.title: Lisa Loeb and Sister Debbie Appear
topics.summary: The studio hosts Lisa Loeb and her sister Debbie to discuss a new reality show, their musical careers, and personal relationships.

topics.title: Celebrity Rumors and Segment Previews
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments including a profile of Benji, an interview with Lisa Loeb, and a game where listeners identify fake celebrity news stories.

topics.title: Pop Culture Critiques and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show features a critique of the American Idol board game, a discussion on the cost of Hollywood Walk of Fame stars, an analysis of Wayne Gretzky's gambling rumors, and a review of Jackie Martin's latest song lyrics.

topics.title: Musical Performance and Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on classic rock, the performance of "The Needle and the Damage Done," and various humorous exchanges regarding guitar playing and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: Iraq Hostage, Celebrity News, and Local Reports
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including an Iraqi hostage situation, domestic spying allegations, music charts, television ratings for Survivor and Dancing with the Stars, local crime reports involving a minister, celebrity film reviews, and a bizarre 911 call regarding a baby in a toilet.
